expected_diagnostics.message: Change packet references an issue file that does not exist.
expected_diagnostics.recommendation: Create .hub/issues/missing-contract.md or remove missing-contract from the change packet.

expected_diagnostics.message: Issue frontmatter points to a different change packet.
expected_diagnostics.recommendation: Set issue field change to broken-change or move the issue to the referenced packet.

expected_diagnostics.message: Task list mentions an issue not linked from change.yml.
expected_diagnostics.recommendation: Add ui-shell to change.yml issues or remove it from tasks.md.
